description: Non-release manual / private firmware artifact candidates. Drives the workflow_dispatch-only .github/workflows/manual-firmware-artifacts.yml lane that compiles the FanRelay / FanPWM / FanDAC manual / no-WebFlash candidates and uploads ONLY temporary, expiring GitHub Actions artifacts for point-to-point operator handoff. This lane is explicitly non-release: it never creates a GitHub Release, never writes firmware/sources.json or manifest.json, never commits a .bin / checksum / build-info file, never sets a release channel, never reuses a product-catalog artifact_name, never adds a WebFlash wrapper, and never flips webflash_build_matrix. See docs/manual-install-fan-candidates.md and docs/product-readiness-matrix.md §MANUAL-FIRMWARE-ARTIFACT-POLICY-001.

preview_policy.note: These three fan-driver candidates are the FanRelay / FanPWM / FanDAC PREVIEW-tier buildable targets enumerated in config/preview-release-targets.json. WebFlash import is barred by the fan-driver guardrail (scripts/list_release_targets.py refuses a fan token in the release matrix; the catalog keeps webflash_build_matrix=false), so their preview builds are delivered ONLY as the temporary, expiring artifacts this non-release lane produces. They remain not stable, not recommended, not a default, not WebFlash, and carry no compliance claim.

candidates.stable_blocker: Mains-safety / installation-approval / creepage / clearance evidence + competent-person sign-off + GPIO3 strap-pin boot characterisation.
candidates.caveat: mains / safety / competent-person sign-off still required; not kit / default / recommended

candidates.stable_blocker: Measured current / thermal evidence (S360-311-CURRENT-THERMAL-001); RPM / TachIO not claimed.
candidates.caveat: no RPM / TachIO claim; measured current / thermal still required

candidates.stable_blocker: Cloudlift S12 / J3 harness + product-bench evidence; S360-312 schematic / BOM.
candidates.caveat: not Cloudlift-ready; J3 / Cloudlift evidence still required; no compliance claim
